name: law firms managing 5–15 contracts/month tool
description: For law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, inefficient tracking causes missed deadlines. We centralize agreements instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: inefficient tracking of contract renewals leading to missed deadlines

locked_fields.primary_problem: inefficient tracking of contract renewals leading to missed deadlines
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, inefficient tracking causes missed deadlines. We centralize agreements instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
